title: molkenboeria striata
intro: Molkenboeria striata is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae, commonly known as mistletoe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Molkenboeria striata include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat gastrointestinal problems. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", molkenboeria striata (also known as molokhia) benefits include the prevention of gut dysbiosis and obesity due to its inhibitory effects on lipid accumulation, gut permeability, and hepatic lipid accumulation.
